name: io.github.AIDataNordic/nordic-financial-mcp
description: Nordic financial data MCP server — semantic search across 173,000+ documents including company filings, press releases, and macro data for Norway, Sweden, Denmark, and Finland

tools.name: search_filings
tools.description: Search Nordic financial database for company filings, press releases, and macroeconomic summaries

tools.name: get_company_info
tools.description: Look up Norwegian company in Brønnøysund Register

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Fetch live market data and key financial metrics for Nordic listed companies
